issue.body:
## Prerequisites ### To avoid invalid pull requests, please check and confirm following terms - [x] This is not an ad/bug report; - [x] My code follows the [guidelines](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) and [syntax](https://kb.adguard.com/general/how-to-create-your-own-ad-filters) of this project; - [x] I have performed a self-review of my own changes; - [x] My changes do not break web sites, apps and files structure. ## What problem does the pull request fix? ### If the problem does not fall under any category that is listed here, please write a comment below in corresponding section - [ ] Missed ads or ad leftovers; - [ ] Website or app doesn't work properly; - [ ] AdGuard gets detected on a website; - [ ] Missed analytics or tracker; - [ ] Social media buttons — share, like, tweet, etc; - [x] Annoyances — pop-ups, cookie warnings, etc; - [ ] Filters maintenance. ## What issue is being fixed? ### Enter the issue address Example: Fix ### Add your comment and screenshots 1. Your comment Filters 4 newsletter items on PCGamer.com * Header banner * Window in left sidebar * Mid-article window * Full screen modal that may sometimes appear (not pictured) 2. Screenshots
Screenshot 1:
### Terms - [x] By submitting this issue, I agree that pull request does not contain private info and all conditions are met

comment.body: Don't forgot to replace `Example: Fix #100000` with `Fix #228695`.

issue.title: Fix #228673 vidora.stream

comment.body:
> On my side for Firefox, I need to make exceptions to `/encryption.key` request too:
> 
> ```
> @@/encryption.key$stealth=referrer,domain=streameeeeee.site|videostr.net|vidora.stream
> ```
> 
> Can you also add:
> 
> ```
> @@||netrocdn.site/hls*$xmlhttprequest,stealth=referrer
> @@||netrocdn.site/file*$xmlhttprequest,stealth=referrer
> ```

Thanks for letting me know. I will take a look. Did you happen to review my other pull request about Missav? I’d like to make sure it’s all ready before Alex reviews it again.

issue.title: Fix #228673 vidora.stream

comment.body:
On my side for Firefox, I need to make exceptions to `/encryption.key` request too:

```adblock
@@/encryption.key$stealth=referrer,domain=streameeeeee.site|videostr.net|vidora.stream
```

Can you also add:

```adblock
@@||netrocdn.site/hls*$xmlhttprequest,stealth=referrer
@@||netrocdn.site/file*$xmlhttprequest,stealth=referrer
```

comment.body:
@ntnguyen1234 could you take a look at this? I'm a bit confused about what Alex is asking about. I didn't remove anything. I just merged the rules and changed: `@@||surrit.com^$image,xmlhttprequest,stealth=referrer,domain=missav.live|missav.ws` to `@@||surrit.com/*/video*.jpeg$image,xmlhttprequest,stealth=referrer,domain=missav.live|missav.ws|missav123.com|missav888.com|missav.*` or am I missing something?

Note: I re-added the note just in case that was it, though I don't think that was the reason.

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

Its position at the left edge, mid page, made the assistant, a quick, easy, and effective means to eradicate slippery ads. But not this time. > I clicked onto the Assistant, then onto Block Ads on This Website. Corralled one dropdown section of the ad that on the right side, followed me up and down the page, It was initially blocked but soon reappeared. The portions of the ad at the top of the page , could be corralled by the green fence, but clicking onto the block button was ineffective. ### Issue URL (Ads) [https://www.partitionwizard.com/partitionmanager/how-to-open-cfg-file-in-win-10-11.html](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.partitionwizard.com%2Fpartitionmanager%2Fhow-to-open-cfg-file-in-win-10-11.html) ### Comment > Used the Legacy Assistant. Its position at the left edge, mid page, made the assistant, a quick, easy, and effective means to eradicate slippery ads. But not this time. > I clicked onto the Assistant, then onto Block Ads on This Website. Corralled one dropdown section of the ad that on the right side, followed me up and down the page, It was initially blocked but soon reappeared. The portions of the ad at the top of the page , could be corralled by the green fence, but clicking onto the block button was ineffective. They remained as they were. ``` Username: @kodonosaki ``` ### Screenshots

This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

### Issue URL (Ads) [https://www.partitionwizard.com/partitionmanager/how-to-open-cfg-file-in-win-10-11.html](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.partitionwizard.com%2Fpartitionmanager%2Fhow-to-open-cfg-file-in-win-10-11.html) ### Comment > Used the Legacy Assistant. Its position at the left edge, mid page, made the assistant, a quick, easy, and effective means to eradicate slippery ads. But not this time. > I clicked onto the Assistant, then onto Block Ads on This Website. Corralled one dropdown section of the ad that on the right side, followed me up and down the page, It was initially blocked but soon reappeared. The portions of the ad at the top of the page , could be corralled by the green fence, but clicking onto the block button was ineffective. comment.diff_hunk:
@@ -905,6 +905,7 @@ portalbsd.com.br##.row > div[style^="height:"]:has(> div[class^="text-"] > a[hre
 portalbsd.com.br##.row > div.col-md-12:has(> div.panel > center > a[href][target="_blank"] > img[src^="images/publicidade/"])
 marcialhub.xyz##.sidebar-hidden > .ad + .c-sidebar
 latamtoon.com,curiosidadtop.com,swordalada.org,marcialhub.xyz##.body-wrap > div[class^="c-sidebar c-top-"]:not(:has(div[class*="widget-manga-popular"]))
+pelisenhd.org##.wp-content a[href^="https://ggpick.com/es/"]:has(> img)
comment.body:
It seems that there are 2 similar ads, but only one is matched by this rule (this at the bottom).
Screenshot
Maybe it could be just: ```adblock pelisenhd.org##a[href^="https://ggpick.com/"] > img ``` ?
On the main page `https://pelisenhd.org/` there are not blocked ads (or ad leftovers when `pelisenhd.org##a[href^="https://ggpick.com/"] > img` is used).
Screenshot
It can be fixed by something like: ```adblock pelisenhd.org##.row--grid > .col-xl-2:has(> .card > .card__cover > a[href^="https://ggpick.com/"]) ```

comment.body: I also see the leftovers. It's fine with the rules above.

comment.diff_hunk:
@@ -22,6 +22,7 @@ google.ad,google.ae,google.al,google.am,google.as,google.at,google.az,google.ba,
 !   SECTION: Cookies - Specific rules ($generichide)
 !
 ! IMPORTANT: For the sites with '$generichide' exclusions
+qwanturankpro.net##.cmplz-cookiebanner.cmplz-show
comment.body:
This section is rather for websites with `$generichide` exclusions?
If I'm not wrong, there is no `$generichide` exclusion for this website, so maybe it could be added to this rule:
```adblock
powietrze.gios.gov.pl,developers.mews.com,tenpoznan.pl##.cmplz-cookiebanner
```
https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/24eb72badb293e48d4d6d37a31ab1b10cc7a5e13/AnnoyancesFilter/Cookies/sections/cookies_specific.txt#L8451

## 🚀 Dizify - Modern Dizi & Film Platformu Altyapısı

Bu depo, **Dizify.org** projesinin temel dinamiklerini ve içerik yönetim mimarisini barındırmaktadır. Gelişmiş SEO optimizasyonları ve kullanıcı deneyimi odaklı geliştirilen bu altyapı, yüksek trafikli medya siteleri için stabilize edilmiştir.

### 🛠 Teknik Özellikler

  * **Hız ve Performans:** WordPress core yüklerini minimize eden özel fonksiyonlar ve asset optimizasyonu.
  * **SEO Mimari:** Dinamik schema yapıları ve breadcrumb entegrasyonu ile tam uyumluluk.
  * **Dinamik Filtreleme:** Kategori bazlı içerik yönetimi ve gelişmiş sorgu (query) optimizasyonları.
  * **Güvenlik & Stabilite:** BTK regülasyonlarına uyumlu görsel maskeleme ve stabil v80/v90 fonksiyon çekirdeği.

### 🔗 Önemli Bağlantılar

  * **[Dizify](https://dizify.org):** 
  * **[Dizi izle](https://dizify.org/diziler):**
  * **[Film İzle](https://dizify.org/filmler):** 

### 💻 Kurulum ve Kullanım

Projenin fonksiyon dosyalarını veya tema bileşenlerini incelemek için ilgili dizinlere göz atabilirsiniz. Özellikle `functions.php` üzerindeki `AJAX live search` ve `asset dequeue` işlemlerine dikkat edilmesi önerilir.

"Syntax Error: Unexpected '$'" veya "Cannot redeclare function"

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking)
[https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.mooveit.bcpb&hl=es](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fplay.google.com%2Fstore%2Fapps%2Fdetails%3Fid%3Dcom.mooveit.bcpb%26hl%3Des)

### Comment
> Dear AdGuard Support Team,
> 
> I am contacting you on behalf of Hispasec Sistemas, a cybersecurity company that provides security support services to Banco de Crédito de Perú (BCP).
> 
> We would like to request your assistance regarding an issue affecting a subset of BCP customers using the mobile applications Banca Móvil BCP and Yape Bolivia.
> 
> Over the past few days, BCP has identified that some users are unable to access these mobile services and receive an error indicating they should check their internet connection. After internal validation, BCP confirmed that their infrastructure and network services are operating normally and that no general changes were made on their side.
> 
> The common factor identified in affected devices is the use of Android Private DNS configured to dns.adguard.com. During testing, the following behavior was observed:
> 
> When Private DNS is set to AdGuard, the applications fail to connect correctly.
> When that configuration is removed, the applications work normally again.
> When using other DNS resolvers, such as Google DNS, the domains resolve correctly and the services remain accessible.
> BCP has also verified that its main domains are not currently listed in blacklists, including:
> 
> bcp.com.bo
> www2.bcp.com.bo
> www4.bcp.com.bo
> www6.bcp.com.bo
> Based on the above, it appears that the issue may be related not necessarily to the main domain itself, but potentially to one or more subdomains, auxiliary endpoints, APIs, CDN components, or related service domains required by the mobile applications, which may be blocked or resolved differently by AdGuard DNS.
> 
> We would appreciate your support to:
> 
> Review whether any domains or subdomains associated with BCP Bolivia ( bcp.com.bo ) and Yape Bolivia (yape.com.bo) are being blocked, filtered, or altered by dns.adguard.com.
> Confirm whether any filtering rule, categorization, or DNS protection policy may be affecting these services.
> Apply the necessary allowlisting or exclusion so legitimate banking customers are not impacted.
> As these are banking and payment services, this matter is particularly sensitive for end users.
> 
> We remain available to provide any additional technical evidence, screenshots, timestamps, or supporting data that may help your investigation.
> 
> Thank you in advance for your assistance.
> 
> Best regards,



### Screenshots

  <summary>Screenshot 1</summary>
